title: Sinytra fix for enchancement
description: Fixes a bug where if you use enchancement wit Sinytra connector the enchantments don't disable.
body: Fixes a bug when [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) is used with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) that makes the enchantment not disappear as intended. If you want to keep some vanilla enchantments open the mod file and change the enchantment disabled list. Requires [Enchantment Disable Tag](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-disable-tag).
